summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements for the Kids Interactive App. All four frontend sections (Home, Learning, Memory Match, Draw) are present, along with a backend for score persistence. The visual theme, decorative accents, and responsive layout are implemented. However, the app introduces Internet Identity / authentication infrastructure which contradicts the constraint of no authentication required. The best score display does not use the exact 'Best: X moves' format. A brush size selector was added without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Score is displayed on the Memory Match screen as 'Best: X moves' (exact label format)
missing_requirements.reason: The MemoryMatch page shows the best score with a Trophy icon and a separate 'Best' label div rather than the exact 'Best: X moves' string format specified in the acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication system with login/logout flows
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no authentication required and the app must be immediately usable without a login. The diff includes a full InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook with login/clear/status, AuthClient integration, and identity-based actor creation, none of which were requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Per-player Principal-based best score storage in the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend stores scores keyed by Principal (caller identity), which only makes sense with authentication. The spec asks for simple best score persistence without user accounts. getBestScore also traps with a runtime error when no score exists rather than returning a graceful default.

hallucinated_features.description: Brush size selector in the Draw section
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies a color palette and a Clear button for the drawing canvas. A brush size selector with multiple size options was added but not requested.
